Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Westbound Reroute near Chicago/Wells
ShortDescription: WB 66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, Clark, Grand, Milwaukee, Chicago over normal route, due to fire department activity near Chicago/Wells

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via Chicago, Clark, Grand, Milwaukee, Chicago, over normal route, due to fire department activity near Chicago/Wells.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
